CONTRACT SELECTION

Premium Strike Radar

$

Lower premium does not mean higher quality. ACTIONABLE status requires price, spread, distance, recent volume, fresh premium, buy pressure, and aligned underlying momentum. Missing gates prevent promotion.

EXECUTION

No position is assumed. Wait for price acceptance through the trigger and contract flow confirmation.
